mapper.sql: teamClassOrderId, openId, userId, orderType, teamClassId, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, coachName, classTime, classRoom, classAddress, className,price,imgUrl, createdDate, payTime, finish
mapper.insert: insert into team_class_order (teamClassOrderId, openId, userId, orderType, teamClassId, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, coachName, classTime, classRoom, classAddress, className,price,imgUrl, createdDate, payTime, finish ) values (#{teamClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classRoom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into team_class_order
teamClassOrderId,
openId,
userId,
orderType,
teamClassId,
storeId,
orderNo,
transactionNo,
paySum,
payType,
realPayment,
status,
coachName,
classTime,
classRoom,
classAddress,
className,
energy,
price,
imgUrl,
classLabel,
createdDate,
payTime,
finish,
#{teamClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classRoom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update team_class_order
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paySum = #{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classRoom = #{classRoom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classAddress = #{classAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where teamClassOrderId = #{teamClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update team_class_order set openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paySum = #{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classRoom = #{classRoom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classAddress = #{classAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where teamClassOrderId = #{teamClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select tco.userId, tco.orderNo, tco.teamClassId as classId, tco.className, tco.imgUrl as firstImgUrl, concat(tco.realPayment,'') as paySum, tco.status, date_format(tco.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate from team_class_order tco where tco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by tco.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from team_class_order tco where tco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select tco.userId, tco.orderNo, concat(tco.realPayment,'') as realPayment, tco.status, tco.coachName, tco.classTime, tco.classRoom, tco.classAddress, tco.className, concat(tco.price,'') as price, tco.imgUrl, date_format(tco.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate, date_format(tco.payTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as payTime, date_format(tco.finish, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as finish, tco.teamClassId as classId, tco.className, concat(tco.price,'') as classPrice, tco.imgUrl as firstImgUrl from team_class_order tco where tco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tco.orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT teamClassOrderId, openId, userId, orderType, teamClassId, orderNo, transactionNo, storeId,energy, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, coachName, classTime, classRoom, classAddress,className,price,imgUrl, createdDate, payTime, finish FROM team_class_order WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}
SELECT teamClassOrderId, status,createdDate FROM team_class_order WHERE status = 0
